args:
set -eu
root=$(mktemp -d)
bundle_dir="$root/bundle"
measure_dir="$root/measure"
benchmark_dir="$root/benchmark"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure prefill-path --out "$measure_dir" >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- benchmark --out "$benchmark_dir" >/dev/null
python3 - "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json" "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json" "$benchmark_dir/benchmark_matrix.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
materialization = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
measurement = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
benchmark = json.load(open(sys.argv[3]))
assert materialization['executed_artifact_count'] >= 1
assert materialization['reused_artifact_count'] >= 0
assert len(materialization['nodes']) >= materialization['executed_artifact_count']
assert materialization['waves']
assert measurement['scoped_cold']['phase_timings']['warmup_materialization_ms'] >= measurement['scoped_warm']['phase_timings']['warmup_materialization_ms']
assert measurement['scoped_vs_broad']['bytes_written_delta'] >= 0
assert measurement['warm_vs_cold']['reused_artifact_delta'] >= 0
assert benchmark['benchmark_program_version'] == 1
assert benchmark['entries']
first = benchmark['entries'][0]
assert first['trace_references']
assert first['cold_unique_artifact_bytes_delta'] >= 0
PY
printf 'memory-bundle-materialization\n'
